name: Shapley Context Pruning: A Cooperative Game Perspective for Context Reranking and Pruning
summary: arXiv:2607.16209v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Context reranking and pruning have become essential for improving the efficiency of modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, yet an inter...
description: arXiv:2607.16209v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Context reranking and pruning have become essential for improving the efficiency of modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, yet an interpretable and unified framework remains underexplored. Previous work has primarily emphasized lexical retrieval, cross-encoder architectures, model distillation, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), mostly...
author: Yanqiao Chen, Dongsheng Hou, Yuhan Rui, Zhen Cao, Yepang Liu
